Case# CMBufferQueue.TriggerCondition.whenBufferCountBecomesGreaterThan(_:)

iOS 13.0+iPadOS 13.0+Mac CatalystmacOS 10.15+tvOS 13.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 6.0+

```

```
